
![](../static/logo_3.png)

## Primers on Generative AI 

1. [Generative AI: A Brief Primer](https://genai.richmond.edu/about/primer.html) *From the University of Richmond*

2. [A Simple Guide to the History of Generative AI](https://bernardmarr.com/a-simple-guide-to-the-history-of-generative-ai/) *By Bernard Marr*

3. [Generative artificial intelligence: a historical perspective](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11970245/) *By Ran He et al.*

## Perspectives from across the spectrum 

1. [Machines of Loving Grace](https://darioamodei.com/essay/machines-of-loving-grace) *By Dario Amodei* 

2. [The Adolescnce of Technology](https://darioamodei.com/essay/the-adolescence-of-technology) *By Dario Amodei* 

3. [Something Big is Happening](https://x.com/mattshumer_/status/2021256989876109403?s=42) *By Matt Schumer*

4. [How to Stay Sane in the AI Skills Race](https://www.wsj.com/tech/ai/how-to-stay-sane-in-the-ai-skills-race-d44b6c97) *By Callum Borchers* 

5. [AI Is Killing The Cover Letter](https://knowledge.wharton.upenn.edu/article/ai-is-killing-the-cover-letter/?utm_campaign=KatW_Weekly2026&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kw_campaign_monitor&utm_term=2-25-2026&utm_content=AI_Is_Killing_the_Cover_Letter) *By Judd Kessler*

6. [Anthropic just dropped its core AI safety promise, and that should worry you](https://www.xda-developers.com/anthropic-just-dropped-its-core-ai-safety-promise/) *By Mahnoor Faisal for XDA*

7. [How the Last Analog Generation Can Shape AI](https://knowledge.wharton.upenn.edu/article/how-the-last-analogue-generation-can-shape-ai/?utm_campaign=KatW_Weekly2026&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kw_campaign_monitor&utm_term=3-4-2026&utm_content=How_the_Last_Analog_Generation_Can_Shape_AI) *By Cornelia C. Walther*

8. [Empire of AI: Dreams and Nightmares in Sam Altman's Open AI](https://karendhao.com/) *By Karen Hao*

## So you want to be an AI wizard: courses and tutorials

1. [Anthropic Courses](https://claude.com/resources/courses?open_in_browser=1) 
- In particular [AI fluency for students](https://anthropic.skilljar.com/ai-fluency-for-students) and [AI fluency for educators](https://anthropic.skilljar.com/ai-fluency-for-educators)

The perspectives represented here do not necessarily reflect my opinions.
